_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Arthroscopic Meniscus Repair / Meniscectomy, Reconstruction of Cruciate Ligament with implant and brace
procedure_name: Reconstruction of Cruciate Ligament (Posterior) with implant and brace
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience
clinical_indications: Torn posterior cruciate ligament (PCL) requiring reconstruction to restore stability to the knee joint

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
MRI scan of affected part labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)

claim.label: Intra operative still image with patient name
Post procedure X-ray showing implant labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) - affected part
Invoice and bar code of implant ensure brace is provided in package cost

cpd_claim.q: Does the Post procedure X ray show the implant in reconstruction of cruciate ligament with implant and brace?

common_queries: Post procedure X-ray does not show the implant for reconstruction of cruciate ligament with implant and brace.
MRI scan of affected part is not labelled with patient ID, date, or side (Left/Right).
Invoice or barcode of implant is missing, or brace provision is not confirmed.

clinical_key_pointers: Posterior cruciate ligament reconstruction is an operation to replace your torn posterior cruciate ligament (PCL) and restore stability to your knee joint.
